title: Puppy Paws
description: A mod that adds several new dogs to be companions on your adventures!
body:
‎ 

![Puppy Paws](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5536cd3f73cb41b0a7577dfc3ef8383bcf26fdd8.png)

‎ 

‎ 

This Mod adds dogs adapted to the vanilla experience, you can find them around the world, they     can be domesticated with bones or bone cookie, making the process 50% easier.

Some dogs can benefit you, such as in combat or archeology in structures.

‎ 

‎ 

![Dogs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35d5953acbf3ba723c0834e278048b4a2fe27438.png)

‎ 

##     **‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎  Puppy Paws 1.0v** 

> - Chihuahua
> - Borzoi
> - Golden Retriever
> - Great Dane
> - Pug
> - Bone Cookie
> - Great Dane Attack
> - Golden Retrievers helps on archeology
> - New Music Disc: Texture By @hecco

‎ 

_In case you want to use Sinytra Connector and the necessary dependencies for its operation in FORGE, if you have any questions you can ask in the official project discord:_

- [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/n6e9QpS9m2)

‎
